name: mlx-vlm-skills
description: Skills for MLX-VLM CLI inference, server inference, and reproducible GitHub issues.

interface.shortDescription: Run CLI/server inference and write reproducible issues
interface.longDescription: Skills for MLX-VLM's practical support workflows: command-line inference, local server/API inference, and creating reproducible GitHub issues from failures or bug reports.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the MLX-VLM skills to help run CLI inference, debug server inference, or create a reproducible GitHub issue.
